notes: pcidrv KMDF receive path. NICHandleRecvInterrupt and NICServiceReadIrps are internal helpers called from NICEvtInterruptDpc — they run at DISPATCH_LEVEL but are NOT registered callbacks. Scanner spinlock heuristic misfires on them, producing dispatch false positives. This reveals a second scanner error class: spinlock heuristic over-fires on internal helpers.

NICHandleRecvInterrupt.label: other
NICHandleRecvInterrupt.notes: Internal helper: 'called with the Rcv SPINLOCK held' (comment). Called from NICEvtInterruptDpc. Runs at DISPATCH_LEVEL but is NOT a registered callback. Scanner mislabels as 'dispatch' via spinlock heuristic — false positive.

NICServiceReadIrps.label: other
NICServiceReadIrps.notes: Internal helper called from NICHandleRecvInterrupt. Serves pending read IRPs. Runs at DISPATCH_LEVEL (caller context) but not a registered callback. Scanner mislabels as 'dispatch' — false positive.

NICReturnRFD.label: other
NICReturnRFD.notes: Internal helper: returns an RFD to the free list. Not a registered callback.

NICStartRecv.label: other
NICStartRecv.notes: Internal helper: starts receive processing. Not a registered callback.

NICResetRecv.label: other
NICResetRecv.notes: Internal helper: resets receive state. Not a registered callback.
